prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名2026年约第131名，近 年排名在127-136之间波动，整体稳定；声誉文件中无新疆大学明显负面或正面事件记录，舆情平稳；抖音热度排名第72，评价为\"一般\"，短视频曝光量中等 偏低，未出现报考关注异常升温信号；第五轮学科评估中新疆大学未进入A-及以上等级名单，暂无A类学科数据。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐，与该校理科招生专业高度重合，相关专业热度上升可能带动整体报考热度；新疆2025年 理科考生约52538人，2026年总考生约238000人（不确定），按近年理科占比约68.6%估算，2026年理科考生约163268人，较2025年大幅增加，竞争加剧2025年理科 本科一批421分，较2024年390分上升31分，难度有所提升；新疆大学位于本省乌鲁木齐市，对本省考生具有天然地域偏好优势；本地招生占比高（理科计划占该 校总计划绝大部分），本省考生报考意愿较强。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 18033, which significantly advanced to 15067 in 2024 (an improvement of about 2966 places), and slightly moved back to 15479 in 2025 (a backward shift of about 412 places). Over the past three years, the overall trend has been forward, with the most notable improvement in 2024, and a slight correction in 2025, still better than the 2023 level. In 2023, the science enrollment plan was 1049, in 2024 it was 1065 (a slight increase), and in 2025 it was sharply reduced to 854 (a decrease of about 19.8%). The 2026 plan is 742, a further reduction of 112 from 2025 (a decrease of about 13.1%). Two consecutive years of significant enrollment reduction have led to a marked increase in competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 131st, with recent rankings fluctuating between 127 and 136, overall stable. There are no significant negative or positive events recorded in the reputation file for Xinjiang University, with stable public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 72nd, rated as 'average', with medium to low short video exposure, showing no abnormal increase in application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Xinjiang University did not enter the A- or above grade list, and there is currently no data on A-level disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended due to social popularity, and they highly overlap with the university's science enrollment majors. The rising popularity of related majors may drive overall application heat. In 2025, there were approximately 52538 science examinees in Xinjiang, and in 2026, the total number of examinees is about 238000 (uncertain). Based on the recent science proportion of about 68.6%, the estimated number of science examinees in 2026 is about 163268, a significant increase from 2025, intensifying competition. The 2025 science first batch undergraduate line is 421 points, up 31 points from 390 in 2024, indicating increased difficulty. Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, Xinjiang, providing a natural regional preference advantage for local examinees. The local enrollment proportion is high (science plans account for the vast majority of the university's total plans), and local examinees have a strong willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 15479, the 2026 plan reduction of 13.1% compared to 2025 (which would advance the ranking), and the significant increase in the total number of local examinees and the rise in the provincial control line (which would push the ranking back), a slight correction is made after weighing both factors. The predicted minimum ranking for science in 2026 is approximately 14461, with a range of 13961 to 14961.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 13961 to 14961, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<13961), you can focus on competitive majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Electrical Engineering and Automation. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (>14961), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
